description: CompositionGreen sweatshirt made of 100% cotton, has a hood with woven cotton drawstrings, short sleeves to the elbows with a broad, flat knit band at the cuffs, a hand-warmer pouch on front, and flock print branding on the left chestFitRegularWash careMachine wash cold inside out with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or wringTumble dry or flat dry in shadeWarm iron; Do not iron on decorationsCosy and soft on your skin, this stylish hooded sweatshirt from wrangler will keep you warm in the winter chill and will soon become a wardrobe favourite.  Pair this with jeans and sneakers or use it as an extra layer when you're off out for your early morning run.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8” and chest 33”
